Finding: 1908 purchase and 10422 non-purchase sessions; no missing values; right-skewed behavioral measures with high-end outliers.
Mean duration 1194.7 seconds; 95% CI 1161.0 to 1228.5; p = 0.7605 against 1,200 seconds.
Buyers spend 806.2 seconds longer on product pages; 95% CI 696.8 to 915.7; p < .001.
Returning-visitor share difference -10.1 percentage points; 95% CI -12.1 to -8.1; p < .001.
